description: A single resume / CV version. A resume owns no employment facts of its own — it is a curated, ordered view that backlinks to is.dame.resume.job and is.dame.resume.education records and, per entry, selects which highlight bullets to show. Keep many of these to maintain audience-tailored variants (e.g. "primary", "product-design") that all stay in sync with the underlying jobs.

main.description: Record key is the resume's slug (e.g. "primary"); it doubles as the /resume/<slug> URL.

title.description: Internal/display name for this version, e.g. "Primary résumé" or "Product & design".

slug.description: URL slug. Should match the record key.

headline.description: Professional headline, e.g. "Creative Technologist & Product Designer".

visibility.description: Website display intent (NOT privacy — the record is always publicly fetchable). "public": listed and rendered. "unlisted": reachable at its URL but not indexed. "private": not rendered on the site.

featured.description: Marks the default resume shown at /resume when no slug is given. At most one should be true.

entries.description: Work-history section: ordered backlinks to jobs, each selecting which of that job's highlights to show.

education.description: Education section: ordered backlinks to is.dame.resume.education records.

skills.description: Skill groups shown on this resume. Authored inline (rather than backlinked) because skill emphasis is the most audience-specific part of a resume.

contact.description: Contact block for this version. Omit to fall back to the site profile.

entry.description: A backlink from a resume to one job, plus this resume's tailoring of it.

job.description: AT URI of an is.dame.resume.job record. A bare URI (not a strongRef) so the entry always tracks the job's latest version.

highlightIds.description: Which of the job's highlight ids to include, in this order. Each item is either a bare highlight id ("h3" — shows the canonical text) or "<highlightId>#<variantId>" ("h3#v2" — shows that forked phrasing from the highlight's variants). Omit to include every non-private highlight in its natural order.

titleOverride.description: Optional per-resume retitling of the role (e.g. condensing for a one-pager). Falls back to the job's title.

summaryOverride.description: Optional per-resume role summary. Falls back to the job's summary.

education.description: AT URI of an is.dame.resume.education record.

highlightIds.description: Same shape as entry.highlightIds — bare highlight ids or "<highlightId>#<variantId>" variant refs.
